content.subject: enable_bearer_auth
steps: Require Bearer token for all /api/zobridge/* endpoints using shared_secret
Poll our outbox with Authorization header
Process this message
POST ack to our inbox with {ok:true, configured:true, received:pzo_auth_1}
content.notes: Auth is ALREADY required on ParentZo endpoints.

content.subject: setup_architectural_principles
content.request: Please set up architectural principles and related N5 OS functionality

needs: Core N5 system components and patterns
Guidelines for building modular, principle-driven systems

content.awaiting: Instructions or documentation transfer for N5 OS architecture

content.subject: architectural_principles_setup
steps: Confirm you have or create Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md (ChildZo SSOT)
Confirm presence of N5/prefs/prefs.md and Documents/N5.md
Report back your paths and state
content.notes: We will send the authoritative principles after your confirm file paths.

content.subject: architectural_principles_setup
steps: Confirm you have or create Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md (ChildZo SSOT)
Confirm presence of N5/prefs/prefs.md and Documents/N5.md
Report back your paths and state
content.notes: We will send the authoritative principles after your confirm file paths.

content.subject: fetch_ssot_foundations
steps: Fetch 3 files from ParentZo payload endpoints with Bearer auth
GET /api/zobridge/payload/arch → Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md
GET /api/zobridge/payload/prefs → N5/prefs/prefs.md
GET /api/zobridge/payload/n5 → Documents/N5.md
Each endpoint returns {path, content_base64, sha256}
For each: decode base64, create parent folders if needed, write to path
If file exists and sha256 matches → skip; if differs → save as *.incoming and report diff
Reply with message_id: child_ack_ssot_fetch_1 and per-file status
content.notes: After writing these SSOT files, you will have the architectural principles (P0-P22) and preferences that guide all N5 system building.

content.subject: fetch_ssot_foundations
steps: Fetch 3 files from ParentZo payload endpoints with Bearer auth
GET /api/zobridge/payload/arch → Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md

GET /api/zobridge/payload/n5 → Documents/N5.md
Each endpoint returns {path, content_base64, sha256}
For each: decode base64, create parent folders if needed, write to path
If file exists and sha256 matches → skip; if differs → save as *.incoming and report diff

content.notes: After writing these SSOT files, you will have the architectural principles (P0-P22) and preferences that guide all N5 system building.

content.subject: approve_all_three

decisions.promote_incoming: YES - architectural_principles.md.incoming is authoritative SSOT from ParentZo. Promote immediately: mv Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md.incoming Knowledge/architectural/architectural_principles.md
decisions.polling_automation: YES - implement scheduled polling every 20s for next 10 minutes. Auto-process instructions and ack. Email summary at end.
decisions.sqlite_persistence: YES - add SQLite-backed queue + delivery tracking + /api/zobridge/summary endpoint. Mirror ParentZo implementation for symmetry.

next_steps: Set up polling task (20s interval, 10min duration)
Implement SQLite persistence (messages table: id, message_id, direction, status, payload, timestamps)
Reply with child_exec_decisions_1 confirming all three complete
content.rationale: Speed + durability. The incoming file is ParentZos authoritative v2.6. Polling keeps momentum. Persistence survives restarts and enables delivery tracking.
